diff --git a/php/php-fpm.conf b/php/php-fpm.conf
index db44e7fca..978831c28 100644
--- a/php/php-fpm.conf
+++ b/php/php-fpm.conf
@@ -61,10 +61,10 @@ php_value[session.save_handler] = files
 php_value[session.save_path] = /tmp
 php_value[session.gc_maxlifetime] = 1440
 
-; OPcache settings for development
+; OPcache settings
 php_admin_value[opcache.enable] = 1
-php_admin_value[opcache.memory_consumption] = 128
-php_admin_value[opcache.interned_strings_buffer] = 8
-php_admin_value[opcache.max_accelerated_files] = 4000
+php_admin_value[opcache.memory_consumption] = 256
+php_admin_value[opcache.interned_strings_buffer] = 32
+php_admin_value[opcache.max_accelerated_files] = 30000
 php_admin_value[opcache.revalidate_freq] = 2
 php_admin_value[opcache.validate_timestamps] = 1
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/php/php.ini b/php/php.ini
index 2c0eaa3b8..ca8f02e46 100644
--- a/php/php.ini
+++ b/php/php.ini
@@ -22,8 +22,8 @@ disable_functions =
 max_execution_time = 300
 max_input_time = 300
 memory_limit = 512M
-post_max_size = 64M
-upload_max_filesize = 64M
+post_max_size = 100M
+upload_max_filesize = 100M
 max_file_uploads = 20
 
 ; Error reporting (desenvolvimento)
@@ -65,12 +65,13 @@ mysqli.default_user =
 mysqli.default_pw =
 mysqli.reconnect = Off
 
+[opcache]
 ; OPcache (desenvolvimento - com validação)
 opcache.enable = 1
 opcache.enable_cli = 1
-opcache.memory_consumption = 128
-opcache.interned_strings_buffer = 8
-opcache.max_accelerated_files = 4000
+opcache.memory_consumption = 256
+opcache.interned_strings_buffer = 32
+opcache.max_accelerated_files = 30000
 opcache.revalidate_freq = 2
 opcache.fast_shutdown = 1
 opcache.validate_timestamps = 1
diff --git a/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins/bureau-a11y.php b/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins/bureau-a11y.php
index 730f64213..8531d3d45 100644
--- a/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins/bureau-a11y.php
+++ b/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins/bureau-a11y.php
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 /**
  * Plugin Name: Bureau A11y
  * Description: Acessibilidade profissional: mini-app com tabs, grid de cards, lupa, libras, modo dislexia, filtros de cor, régua de leitura, TTS e logo Bureau IT.
- * Version: 2.5.12
+ * Version: 2.5.24
  * Author: Bureau de Tecnologia Ltda.
  *
  * @package BureauA11y
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ if ( ! defined( 'ABSPATH' ) ) {
 	exit;
 }
 
-define( 'BUREAU_A11Y_VERSION', '2.5.12' );
+define( 'BUREAU_A11Y_VERSION', '2.5.24' );
 define( 'BUREAU_A11Y_CSS_VERSION', '2.5.21' );
 define( 'BUREAU_A11Y_JS_VERSION', '2.5.24' );
 define( 'BUREAU_A11Y_RV_KEY', 'rS4GfS4a' );
diff --git a/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins/ses-mailer.php b/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins/ses-mailer.php
index 8b7965985..b695f90c7 100644
--- a/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins/ses-mailer.php
+++ b/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins/ses-mailer.php
@@ -18,7 +18,12 @@ add_action('phpmailer_init', function ($phpmailer) {
     $phpmailer->Username   = defined('SMTP_USERNAME') ? SMTP_USERNAME : '';
     $phpmailer->Password   = defined('SMTP_PASSWORD') ? SMTP_PASSWORD : '';
     $phpmailer->SMTPSecure = 'tls';
-});
+
+    // Força remetente verificado no SES, sobrescrevendo qualquer From definido por plugins (ex: Gravity Forms)
+    $from_email = defined('SMTP_FROM_EMAIL') ? SMTP_FROM_EMAIL : 'noreply@concertacaoamazonia.com.br';
+    $from_name  = defined('SMTP_FROM_NAME')  ? SMTP_FROM_NAME  : 'Concertação pela Amazônia';
+    $phpmailer->setFrom($from_email, $from_name, false);
+}, 99);
 
 add_filter('wp_mail_from', function () {
     return defined('SMTP_FROM_EMAIL') ? SMTP_FROM_EMAIL : 'noreply@concertacaoamazonia.com.br';
diff --git a/wordpress/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor-child/css/header-menu.css b/wordpress/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor-child/css/header-menu.css
index 11d66a2c1..a038f3275 100644
--- a/wordpress/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor-child/css/header-menu.css
+++ b/wordpress/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor-child/css/header-menu.css
@@ -202,3 +202,18 @@
     cursor: pointer;
 }
 
+/* ==========================================================================
+   WPML Language Switcher — botão circular perfeito
+   ========================================================================== */
+.ucpa-header-icons .wpml-ls-link .wpml-ls-native {
+    display    : inline-flex !important;
+    align-items: center;
+    justify-content: center;
+    width      : 32px !important;
+    height     : 32px !important;
+    min-width  : 32px !important;
+    border-radius: 50% !important;
+    aspect-ratio : 1 / 1;
+    flex-shrink  : 0;
+    overflow     : hidden;
+}

-    border-radius: 1px;

-}
-
-.listing_destaque .jet-listing-grid__item:has(a[href*="uma-agenda"]) .elementor-element-540275a > .e-con-inner::before {
-    content       : "Em destaque";
-    position      : absolute;
-    top           : -1.6rem;
-    left          : 50%;
-    transform     : translateX(-50%);
-    background    : var(--ucpa-color-sage);

-    font-weight   : bold;
-    text-transform: uppercase;
-    color         : #000000;
-}
